title: Final_Eye → Queen CANVAS secure vision wire
motto: Straight path by default — sealed localhost egress. Final_Eye looks only when asked; look may share with Hostess 7.

routing.straight_path: Display/capture MJPEG → CANVAS → stream — no OCR or look in the hot path
routing.look_path: Final_Eye look on demand — truth-gated before any Hostess 7 share or permanency
routing.hostess7_share: Only when look_path is invoked — vision excerpt shared via hostess7-growth truth gate
